name: crataegus oxyacantha
title: crataegus oxyacantha benefits
description: Crataegus oxyacantha reduces blood pressure by lowering systolic and diastolic blood pressure levels in the body, resulting in a healthier cardiovascular system. This benefit is important because high blood pressure is a major risk factor for heart disease, stroke, and kidney disease, which can lead to disability and even death if left unmanaged.
